productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Purple Wallet
description: A perfect ensemble for your classy dresses and ethnic wear, this clutch from lino perros has an electro pleated fabric upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Fabric upper in an electro pleated pattern Has a press closure with a removable metallic chain handle One organiser pouch on the inside to hold your mobile Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
